name: Beef Stir Fry with Tri-Color Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from beef and cut crosswise into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Heat oil in a large non-stick skillet over high heat until hot.
3. Add beef, soy sauce, and the next three ingredients; stir fry 3 minutes or until beef is done.
4. Remove beef mixture from skillet; set aside and keep warm.
5. Place skillet over medium-high heat; add onion and bell peppers, and stir fry 5 minutes.
6. Return beef mixture to skillet; add vinegar, and cook 1 minute.
Yield: 4 servings
About 166 calories per 1 cup serving.
